name: Exowork Onboarding Demo
description: Hands-on onboarding session: transcripts → requirements → user stories → working Salesforce org

phases.name: Project Setup
phases.description: Initialize the project and verify environment is ready

steps.name: Initialize Project
steps.description: Set up repo with client name, tier, and transcripts

phases.name: Gather Materials
phases.description: Upload call transcripts and client documents for requirements extraction

steps.name: Upload Call Transcripts
steps.description: Upload sales handoff and discovery call transcripts

steps.name: Upload Client Documents
steps.description: Upload SOW, org charts, and other client documents (optional)

phases.name: Requirements Worksheet
phases.description: Build the requirements worksheet iteratively — each transcript pass fills gaps and upgrades confidence

steps.name: Generate/Update Requirements Worksheet
steps.description: Create or update the worksheet from transcripts and client docs. First pass extracts what it can (with gaps marked). Each subsequent pass merges new information, fills gaps, and upgrades confidence levels.

inputFiles.label: Call Transcripts
inputFiles.description: Select call transcripts to include (add one per pass to see iterative refinement)

inputFiles.label: Client Documents
inputFiles.description: Select SOW, org charts, and other client docs

inputFiles.label: Existing Worksheets
inputFiles.description: Select previous worksheet versions to build upon

steps.name: Upload Call Transcript
steps.description: Upload a new call transcript (discovery call, walkthrough recording, follow-up) to feed into the next worksheet pass

phases.name: User Stories
phases.description: Break the confirmed requirements worksheet into sequenced, implementation-ready user stories

steps.name: Create User Stories
steps.description: Decompose finalized worksheet into sequenced user stories with acceptance criteria and dependency map

phases.name: Story Execution
phases.description: Plan, implement, and QA each user story against a live scratch org

steps.name: Plan → Implement → QA Each Story
steps.description: For each user story: plan (grounded in org state), implement (via CLI), and QA (with SOQL evidence). Use /salesforce-coe:sp:feedback to capture learnings when things deviate.
